title: Cosmos Breadcrumb — animated trail whose segments slide/fade in one by one with chevron separators
title_vi: Cosmos Breadcrumb — chuỗi điều hướng động, các đoạn trượt/mờ hiện lần lượt với dấu chevron
summary: A polished, self-contained animated breadcrumb trail on the Cosmos Phantom-dark theme: a glassy panel holds the path Home / Section / Subsection / Page, where each segment slides up and fades in one by one with a chevron separator appearing alongside it and the last segment carrying a violet highlight pill. Zero dependencies, pure HTML/CSS/vanilla JS. LIVE mode is genuinely interactive (hover any non-final segment to pulse its highlight pill; an idle loop plays the demo); AUTO mode plays a deterministic, seamlessly looping demo that builds the trail up, holds, navigates (the Section then Subsection segment highlights in sequence), holds, then resets the trail back out. All captured motion is a pure function of u via render(u)/__seek so frames are exact regardless of capture timing.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. LIVE: hover any segment except the last and its highlight pill pulses in; while idle the component auto-plays its build/navigate/reset demo loop and the caption narrates the phase. KEY TECHNIQUES: per-segment visibility is a clamped ramp v=clamp(p-i,0,1) over a build progress p in [0,N], eased with easeOutCubic, driving opacity plus a translate that slides each segment up-and-left into place; chevrons fade in tied to their right-hand segment; the highlight pill is a ::after gradient whose --lit opacity is set from JS (last segment always lit, navigate phase pulses chosen indices with sin); the render(u) timeline splits u into BUILD (p 0->N) / HOLD / NAVIGATE (two sequential sin pulses on idx 1 then 2) / HOLD / RESET (p N->0 via smoothstep); a +0.18 phase offset makes frame 0 land mid-build with a couple segments already in (rich, never blank). CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: LOOP (cycle speed), N (segment count — also update DOM segs/chevs and LABELS), the phase split thresholds (0.42/0.56/0.80), slide distances ((1-v)*-10 / *9), the navigate pulse timing/width, accent colours in the .pill::after gradient.
summary_vi: Component breadcrumb động hoàn chỉnh, tự chứa, theme Phantom-dark của Cosmos: panel kính chứa đường dẫn Home / Section / Subsection / Page, mỗi đoạn trượt lên và mờ hiện lần lượt cùng dấu chevron, đoạn cuối có pill highlight tím. Không phụ thuộc, thuần HTML/CSS/JS. LIVE tương tác thật (hover đoạn không phải cuối để pulse pill; loop chạy demo khi rảnh); AUTO chạy demo loop liền mạch deterministic: dựng chuỗi, giữ, điều hướng (Section rồi Subsection sáng lần lượt), giữ, rồi reset. Mọi chuyển động là hàm thuần của u qua render(u)/__seek.
notes: Độ hiện mỗi đoạn là ramp v=clamp(p-i,0,1) theo tiến trình build p trong [0,N], ease bằng easeOutCubic, điều khiển opacity và translate trượt vào chỗ; timeline render(u) chia BUILD/HOLD/NAVIGATE/HOLD/RESET với offset +0.18 để frame 0 nằm giữa lúc dựng nên không trống.
